culturalNote: Hinglish-leaning English-first. Themes: middle-class Indian parents, IT/engineering culture, marriage pressure, Bangalore/Mumbai cost-of-living, food (street + home), arranged marriage humor, wedding fatigue, sasta-vs-mehenga consumer reviews, Zomato/Swiggy life. Voice: warm-savage, code-switches naturally between English and Hindi/Hinglish. Avoid pure Hindi (defeats English-first). Avoid stereotyping South vs North — call out the joke if used.

hooks.text: Yeh ek galti mat karna in your 20s
Indian parents won't stop until you're a doctor

GRWM for an Indian engagement function
